_comment: STANDALONE manifest for NYC Visualizer (de-federation, 2026-07-24). NYC Visualizer is a standalone product, not part of any shared site ecosystem — no cross-site switcher and no hub link ship. It is listed on the personal site nickanderson.us. This file is trimmed to ONLY the nycvisualizer entry plus the author anchor; its one consumer is the Research Triad (Data/Code/Outputs), which reads sites[key==nycvisualizer].cdf. The site still uses the shared Arcanum Site Kit chrome for its engineering standards.

data.note: geospatial layers ship GeoJSON + GeoParquet (+ GeoPackage where convenient); tabular data ships CSV/XLSX/Parquet, never plain JSON (Carson DNA D-4)

cdf.citation: Anderson, N. (2026). NYC Visualizer - NYC transit service and pedestrian infrastructure at the finest measurable grain, live. https://nycvisualizer.com.

sites.title: NYC Visualizer
sites.tagline: Where can you go, and can you walk there? — NYC transit service and pedestrian infrastructure at the finest measurable grain, live. A standalone product; the home of all NYC work, hub-with-spokes.
